data.name: Porn Pinball
data.detailed_description:
主宰球檯，解鎖欲望

沉浸在視覺震撼的彈珠台體驗中，在這裡，技巧與誘惑完美邂逅。擋板的每一次揮動和彈碰器的每一次撞擊，都讓你離終極獎賞更近一步。透過六張精心設計的球台，你將探索從細雨迷蒙的賽博朋克街道到陽光明媚的熱帶天堂等各具特色的世界。

核心特色：

  • 六張獨特的 3D 球桌： 探索 Neon Desire、Gothic Night、Divine Rapture、Cyber Seductress、Tropical Temptation 以及全新的 Lotus Bloom，所有場景均以驚人的寫實度呈現。

  • 街機級精準物理： 體驗專業的弹珠台模擬，擁有真實的球體物理效果和精準的控制設計，確保每一次擊球都能達到最高的準確度。

  • 高端 3D 視覺效果：享受先進的光照系統、基於真實物理的球體運動以及電影級的特效。

  • 成人獎勵：達到分數里程碑（最高 200,000,000 分！）即可解鎖成人內容。

  • 18 個挑戰性成就：透過每個關卡的自定義成就圖標，追蹤你的進度並展示你的精湛技巧。

  • 得分挑戰玩法：完善你的技術，攀登排行榜，解鎖每一位女主人所提供的所有隱藏秘密。

  • 動態演變球桌： 不只是欣賞球桌藝術，更要親手改變它。得益於我們的「裸露進度」系統，看板女郎身上的衣物將隨著你高超的彈珠技巧而逐漸消逝。

結識你的女主人：

每張球檯都由一位獨特的女主人守護。掌控鋼球以贏得她們的青睞，解鎖她們最私密的時刻：

  • Sonia (Neon Desire)：數位地下的女王。她為城市的律動和高分連擊而活。

  • Morgana (Gothic Night)：黑暗的女主人，在儀式大廳的陰影中尋找快感。

  • Kayla (Divine Rapture)：天使般的存在，為那些有能力登頂的人提供天堂的滋味。

  • Vex (Cyber Seductress)：高科技女妖，用她的數位秘密獎勵精準的操作和技術大師。

  • Luna (Tropical Temptation)：當你尋找終極寶藏時，她會讓天堂的熱度再次升級。

  • Sakura (Lotus Bloom)： 在花瓣與古剎之間，她守護著傳承千年的秘密。只有你完美的球路，才能揭開她隱藏的美麗。

免責聲明：本遊戲中描繪的所有角色均為虛構人物，年齡均在18歲或以上。所有遊戲桌面和可解鎖場景的藝術風格都側重於成熟的成人審美。

data.short_description: 完美掌握專業彈珠台物理特性與成人內容的結合。征服六位迷人女孩的 3D 球台，挑戰高分以揭開她們最私密的一面，並解鎖高品質、未經審查的露骨成人場景與動畫。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: i5 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: i7 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 3060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870 or greater
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: Porn Pinball
data.detailed_description:
Master the Tables, Unlock the Heat

Dive into a visually breathtaking pinball experience where skill meets seduction. Every flip and every bumper hit brings you closer to the ultimate reward. With six meticulously designed tables, you’ll explore worlds ranging from the rain-soaked streets of a cyberpunk city to the sun-drenched sands of a tropical paradise.

Key Features:

  • Six Unique 3D Tables: Explore Neon Desire, Gothic Night, Divine Rapture, Cyber Seductress, Tropical Temptation, and the new Lotus Bloom, all rendered with stunning realism.

  • Arcade Precision Physics: Experience a professional pinball simulation with realistic ball physics and precise control designed for maximum accuracy with every hit.

  • High-End 3D Visuals: Experience advanced lighting, physics-based ball movement, and cinematic effects.

  • Explicit Rewards: Reach score milestones (up to 200,000,000 points!) to unlock adult content.

  • 18 Challenging Achievements: Track your progress and show off your mastery with custom-designed achievement icons for every level of play.

  • Score Attack Gameplay: Perfect your technique to climb the ranks and unlock every hidden secret each mistress has to offer.

  • Evolving Tables: Don't just look at the table art; transform it. Thanks to our Nudity Progression system, the clothes of the board's protagonists will fade away according to your mastery with the flippers.

Meet Your Hosts

Each table is guarded by a unique mistress. Master the silver ball to win their favor and unlock their most private moments:

  • Sonia (Neon Desire): The queen of the digital underground. She lives for the pulse of the city and high-score streaks.

  • Morgana (Gothic Night): A mistress of darkness who finds pleasure in the shadows of the ritual chamber.

  • Kayla (Divine Rapture): An angelic presence offering a taste of heaven to those skilled enough to reach the top.

  • Vex (Cyber Seductress): A high-tech siren who rewards precision and technical mastery with her digital secrets.

  • Luna (Tropical Temptation): She’ll turn up the heat in paradise while you hunt for the ultimate treasure.

  • Sakura (Lotus Bloom): Among petals and ancient temples, she guards millennial secrets. Only your perfect flow can reveal her hidden beauty.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this game are fictional individuals portrayed as adults aged 18 or older. The artistic style focuses on a mature, adult aesthetic across all tables and unlockable scenes.

data.short_description: Master the perfect fusion of professional pinball physics and adult content. Reveal the most intimate side of six stunning girls as you conquer their 3D tables and achieve massive scores to unlock explicit, uncensored scenes with high-quality adult scenes.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: i5 or equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: i7 or equivalent
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 3060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870 or greater
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
